item.title: AmplifyHER
item.description: I created AmplifyHER in UF’s 2024 WingHacks along with my partner Karlina Maya. Our website prompts the user to pick an option from a list of preselected genres to give them a new playlist. It filters through a gender database that provides us with information about artists gender identity and made it so that only female, non-binary, and GNC individuals would be added to the generated playlists. We utilized a combination of JavaScript, HTML/CSS, and Python in order to create our website.

item.title: Fire Boy and Water Girl
item.description: In my club orginization, Girls Who Code, I worked together with a team of girls in order to create our own virsion of the popular game, Water Boy and Fire Girl. We utilized HTML to ensure seamless display on browsers, JavaScript for the game’s core code and functionalities, and Tiled for crafting and designing the levels.
